mentions.title: Employee credentials dump - {{domain}}
mentions.contentSnippet: Email list leaked containing corporate credentials from {{domain}}. Found 247 email:password pairs. Sample: j.doe@{{domain}}:********

mentions.title: {{domain}} database breach - 15k records
mentions.contentSnippet: Full database dump from {{domain}} posted. Contains email addresses, hashed passwords (bcrypt), phone numbers, and internal employee IDs. 15,342 records total.

mentions.title: APT group discussing {{domain}} infrastructure
mentions.contentSnippet: Threat actor 'ShadowNexus' observed in private channel discussing reconnaissance of {{domain}} infrastructure. Mentions VPN endpoints and employee directory harvesting.

mentions.title: Phishing kit for {{domain}} - ready to deploy
mentions.contentSnippet: Complete phishing kit mimicking {{domain}} login page. Includes HTML templates, credential harvester PHP scripts, and evasion techniques for email filters. Price: $150 BTC.

mentions.title: Lookalike domain {{domain}} variant for sale
mentions.contentSnippet: Domain 'login-{{domain}}' is listed at auction. Previously used for credential harvesting. Current bid: $85. Auction ends 2026-03-10.

mentions.title: Planned attack campaign targeting {{domain}} users
mentions.contentSnippet: Forum post from 'CyberVortex' group detailing planned spear-phishing campaign against {{domain}} employees. Mentions harvested LinkedIn profiles and custom payload delivery via macro-enabled documents.

mentions.title: Malware C2 callback to {{domain}} subdomain
mentions.contentSnippet: Raccoon Stealer v2 sample detected with C2 callback to c2-relay.{{domain}}. Binary hash: a1b2c3d4e5f6... The malware exfiltrates browser credentials, crypto wallets, and session cookies.

mentions.title: API keys for {{domain}} exposed on GitHub
mentions.contentSnippet: Public repository contains production configuration file with API keys, SMTP credentials, and OAuth client secrets for {{domain}}. File: prod-env.yaml committed 3 days ago.

mentions.title: {{domain}} found in active phishing database
mentions.contentSnippet: URL impersonating {{domain}} login portal reported to PhishTank. Verified active phishing page hosted at secure-{{domain}}-verify.com. Targets employee SSO credentials.

mentions.title: {{domain}} VPN credentials shared
mentions.contentSnippet: Paste containing 32 VPN credentials for {{domain}} corporate network. Format: username/password pairs with VPN gateway endpoint. Likely from phishing campaign or insider leak.

mentions.title: Phishing kit repository targeting {{domain}}
mentions.contentSnippet: GitHub repository containing a phishing kit designed to clone {{domain}} web portal. Includes responsive HTML, custom CSS matching brand colors, and a Telegram bot for credential exfiltration.

mentions.title: Database connection string for {{domain}} exposed
mentions.contentSnippet: Production .env file committed to public repository containing PostgreSQL connection string for {{domain}} database, Redis credentials, and AWS S3 access keys. Repository has 12 stars.

mentions.title: Vulnerability discussion targeting {{domain}}
mentions.contentSnippet: Hackers discussing discovered SQL injection in {{domain}} customer portal at /api/v2/search endpoint. Includes proof-of-concept payload and estimated 500k customer records accessible. Posted for sale at $2000.

mentions.title: {{domain}} IP associated with Emotet botnet
mentions.contentSnippet: IP address 203.0.113.42 associated with {{domain}} mail server detected in Emotet botnet command-and-control infrastructure. The IP has been serving as a tier-2 C2 relay since 2026-02-20.

mentions.title: {{domain}} brand used in mass phishing campaign
mentions.contentSnippet: {{domain}} branding detected in a mass email phishing campaign targeting financial services customers. Campaign uses {{domain}} logo and color scheme but low-quality grammar. Estimated 10,000+ emails sent.
